comment: Reference wiring hints for GPT builder — adjust URLs/secrets before production.

notes: Wallet OAuth (link_wallet): register redirect_uri with your wallet issuer to match process.env.DPP_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI (typically the MCP OAuth callback port; see README).
Actions ↔ ChatGPT HTTP: GPT stores DPP_ACTIONS_API_KEY server-side — never put it in system prompts.
For user identity propagation, ChatGPT connectors often require your IdP; pass end-user stable id via X-DPP-User-Id from your middleware.
